name: list
invariants: output.ok === false || output.events.every(e => typeof e.id === 'string' && typeof e.title === 'string')
_note: lore.list browses the hand-authored cosmology canon read straight off content/world/**/lore.json (no DB — file-backed, so {} returns ok:true with the real seeded events, never no_db). hidden_truth is author-only and STRIPPED in lib/authored-lore.js — it can never appear on a returned event. limit is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard: a poisoned value returns ok:false invalid_limit, never a clamped ok:true.
